crowdsourced_yara_results.description: This signature fires on the presence of Base64 encoded URI prefixes (http:// and https://) across any file. The simple presence of such strings is not inherently an indicator of malicious content, but is worth further investigation.
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: InQuest Labs

sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Tom U. @c_APT_ure (collection), oscd.community, Jonhnathan Ribeiro

values.Description: Command Line Interface for Microsoft\xae BLB Backup

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Rare Remote Thread Creation By Uncommon Source Image
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects uncommon processes creating remote threads.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Windows Shell/Scripting Application File Write to Suspicious Folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects Windows shells and scripting applications that write files to suspicious folders
Detects the use of the bcdedit command to tamper with the boot configuration data. This technique is often times used by malware or attackers as a destructive way before launching ransomware.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Identifies use of Fodhelper.exe to bypass User Account Control. Adversaries use this technique to execute privileged processes.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Tony Lambert), oscd.community

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: DotNet CLR DLL Loaded By Scripting Applications
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects .NET CLR DLLs being loaded by scripting applications such as wscript or cscript. This could be an indication of potential suspicious execution.

values.Description: Microsoft .NET Runtime Common Language Runtime - WorkStation

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Shadow Copies Deletion Using Operating Systems Utilities
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Shadow Copies deletion using operating systems utilities

values.Description: Command Line Interface for Microsoft\xae BLB Backup

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious DotNET CLR Usage Log Artifact
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the creation of Usage Log files by the CLR (clr.dll). These files are named after the executing process once the assembly is finished executing for the first time in the (user) session context.

values.Description: Command Line Interface for Microsoft\xae BLB Backup
Command Line Interface for Microsoft\xae BLB Backup

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects suspicious parent process for cmd.exe

Detects the deletion of backups or system state backups via "wbadmin.exe".
This technique is used by numerous ransomware families and actors.
This may only be successful on server platforms that have Windows Backup enabled.

values.Description: Command Line Interface for Microsoft\xae BLB Backup

attributes.magic: ASCII text, with very long lines (65246u), with CRLF line terminators
